title: Daemon's Cobblemon Adventure
description: Dive into a fully realized Pokémon world in Minecraft 1.21.1! This lightweight adventure pack expands the base Cobblemon experience with Mega Evolutions, a massive roster of new Pokémon and new adventures!
body:
# 🍃 A New Era of Cobblemon Adventure

Welcome to a Cobblemon experience designed for 1.21.1, where the charm of Minecraft meets the depth of a full-fledged Pokémon RPG.

This modpack was built with a specific goal in mind: to take the incredible base of Cobblemon and flesh it out into a "Complete Edition" adventure. We have carefully selected addons that enhance exploration, expand the Pokédex, and give you meaningful challenges without cluttering the game with unnecessary tech or magic mods.

Whether you are a competitive battler or a casual explorer, this world is waiting for you.

## 🌟 Key Features

### 🧬 The Ultimate Roster & Mega Evolution

We’ve expanded the ecosystem significantly. With AllTheMons X MSD, you will encounter hundreds of Pokémon that aren't in the base mod yet. But capturing them is just the beginning—unlock the true potential of your partners with Mega Showdown, bringing the power of Mega Evolution to your blocky battles.

### 🏟️ A World That Fights Back

The world isn't just empty wilderness anymore.

**Challenge the League**: stumble upon impressive structures from Rad Gyms naturally generating in the world. Can you defeat the leaders and earn your badges?

**201 Trainers**: As you explore, you will encounter NPC trainers ready to battle. Test your team against distinct difficulty tiers and playstyles.

### 💰 A Living Economy

With Cobbledollars, your victories matter. Earn currency by defeating wild Pokémon and trainers, then use your funds to buy Pokéballs, potions, and evolution items. No more crafting grid grinding—visit the shop and gear up for your next expedition.

### 🗺️ Quality of Life & Additions

We’ve included Cobblemon Additions and other essential tweaks to ensure the gameplay feels smooth. Expect better breeding mechanics, more consistent spawning, and a polished user interface that fits right into modern Minecraft.

# 🚀 Ready to Start Your Journey?

Grab your starter, stock up on potions, and head out into the unknown. The ultimate Cobblemon adventure for 1.21.1 starts here.
